'''Corellian Translines''' was a transportation company throughout the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] shortly after the rise of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Duran Har]] worked for the company, commanding [[SV-45]], an express [[Transport/Legends|transport]].<ref name="TFO" />
